table.name: vtiger_gatepass
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_gatepass` ( `gatepassid` int(11) NOT NULL, `gatepass_no` varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL, `ro_no` varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL, `ro_date` date DEFAULT NULL, `invoice_no` varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL, `invoice_date` date DEFAULT NULL, `contact_id` int(19) DEFAULT NULL, `vehicle_reg_no` varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL, `vehicle_chassis_no` varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL, `sr_no` varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL, `sr_date` date DEFAULT NULL, `sr_type` varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`gatepassid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_gatepasscf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_gatepasscf` ( `gatepassid` int(11) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`gatepassid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
